svg.title: Budget Patrol governance and RBAC diagram v2
svg.desc: Full governance hierarchy with RBAC assignments clearly separated by scope: management group level vs resource group level. Includes Azure Policy initiative, tagging strategy, and landing zone mapping.

g.text: Policy initiative assigned here · RBAC inherited below

svg.text: Future: BudgetPatrol-Dev subscription under same MG · policies and RBAC inherit automatically
Resource group scope (least privilege — scoped as narrow as possible)
Managed identity replaces all credentials · no service principals · scope narrows as far down as possible
Azure Policy initiative: bp-governance-baseline — assigned at management group
Example — PostgreSQL Flexible Server in rg-bp-data
mi-budgetpatrol-apps in rg-bp-security: service = infra · cost-center = infra · environment = prod · owner = arudhran
Landing zone pattern — CAF concept mapping
Owner @ MG · all others @ RG scope
4 RGs by service boundary · Dev sub planned
Single prod sub now · Dev sub future
Full CAF automated landing zone deferred — not needed at MVP scale · pattern correctly applied manually
